'''mazhodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadfan|roadfan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-zh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadfan|roadfan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mazhodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæzhedheth|mæzhedheth]] || [[word:mæzhedhej|mæzhedhej]] || [[word:mæzhedhesh|mæzhedhesh]] || [[word:mæzhedhe|mæzhedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mazhozhodhoth|mazhozhodhoth]] || [[word:mazhozhodhoj|mazhozhodhoj]] || [[word:mazhozhodhosh|mazhozhodhosh]] || [[word:mazhozhodho|mazhozhodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mazhodhoth|mazhodhoth]] || [[word:mazhodhoj|mazhodhoj]] || [[word:mazhodhosh|mazhodhosh]] || [[word:mazhodho|mazhodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mazhofdhoth|mazhofdhoth]] || [[word:mazhofdhoj|mazhofdhoj]] || [[word:mazhofdhosh|mazhofdhosh]] || [[word:mazhofdhof|mazhofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mazhodhotho|mazhodhotho]] || [[word:mazhodhojo|mazhodhojo]] || [[word:mazhodhosho|mazhodhosho]] || [[word:mazhodhoko|mazhodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mazhodhoth|mazhodhoth]] || [[word:mazhodhoj|mazhodhoj]] || [[word:mazhodhosh|mazhodhosh]] || [[word:mazhodho|mazhodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mazhodhothol|mazhodhothol]] || [[word:mazhodhojol|mazhodhojol]] || [[word:mazhodhoshol|mazhodhoshol]] || [[word:mazhodhokol|mazhodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mazhodhothotho|mazhodhothotho]] || [[word:mazhodhojojo|mazhodhojojo]] || [[word:mazhodhoshosho|mazhodhoshosho]] || [[word:mazhodhoko|mazhodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mazhodhothon|mazhodhothon]] || [[word:mazhodhojon|mazhodhojon]] || [[word:mazhodhoshon|mazhodhoshon]] || [[word:mazhodhokon|mazhodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mazhodhothoro|mazhodhothoro]] || [[word:mazhodhojoro|mazhodhojoro]] || [[word:mazhodhoshoro|mazhodhoshoro]] || [[word:mazhodhokoro|mazhodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
